_about: Populated demo registry for verifying the v1.2 UI redesign. Not a real project — renders every tab's populated state. Render via: python3 pb/tools/render.py registry.demo.json pb/template/prototype.html /tmp/pb-preview/index.html

overview.objectives: Let new users create an account and reach their dashboard in under 60 seconds, validating the sign-up flow before production.

principles.title: One job per screen
principles.body: Each screen asks for exactly one decision or input set.

principles.title: Token-only styling
principles.body: No raw hex or px — every value is a design token.

principles.title: Atomic composition
principles.body: Build atoms → molecules → organisms → screens; never inline a one-off.

userInsights.quantitative: 62% of drop-off happens on the password step.
userInsights.researchSummary: Users distrust forms that don't explain password rules up front.
userInsights.executiveSummary: Reduce sign-up friction by surfacing validation inline.

tradeoffs.title: Inline vs. on-submit validation
tradeoffs.question: When do we validate?
tradeoffs.why: Catches errors before the user commits.

components.name: Button
uiLogic: Disabled while the form is invalid.
components.render: var dis = props.state === 'disabled' ? ' disabled' : ''; return '<button class="btn" data-action="submit"' + dis + ' style="height:44px;padding:0 20px;border:0;border-radius:10px;background:var(--brand);color:#fff;font:600 14px Inter;cursor:pointer;opacity:' + (dis?0.5:1) + '">' + (props.label || 'Continue') + '</button>';

components.name: TextInput
components.anatomy: A single-line text field with label.
components.spec: Full width, 1px border, brand focus ring.
uiLogic: Border turns red in the error state.
components.render: var err = props.state === 'error'; return '<input class="field" type="text" data-required placeholder="' + (props.placeholder || '') + '" style="width:100%;height:42px;padding:0 12px;border:1px solid ' + (err?'#dc2626':'var(--border-strong)') + ';border-radius:8px;font:14px Inter" />';

components.name: LoginCard
components.anatomy: Card wrapping the email + password fields and the submit button.
uiLogic: Shows a spinner in the loading state.
components.render:
return '

Sign in

';

screens.name: Login
logicNotes: Submit is disabled until both fields are valid.
Successful submit redirects to the dashboard.
screens.render:
return '

Sign in

';

screens.name: Dashboard
logicNotes: Landing screen after a successful sign-in.
screens.render:
return '

Welcome back 👋

You are signed in.

';

flow.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  Start([Start]) --> Login[Login]
  Login --> Valid{Valid?}
  Valid -- No --> Login
  Valid -- Yes --> Dashboard[Dashboard]
  Dashboard --> End([End])

stories.title: Sign in with email
stories.jtbd: As a user I want to sign in so I can reach my dashboard.

scenarios.text: Valid credentials land on the dashboard.
Invalid email shows an inline error with a red border AND error text.
The email field is focused on load; tab order is email → password → submit.
A locked account is blocked with a support message, not a generic error.
Submitting twice quickly does not create two sessions.

stories.title: Recover from an error
stories.jtbd: As a user I want clear feedback when my input is wrong.

scenarios.text: Error message clears once the field is corrected.
Three failed attempts trigger a rate-limit notice.

coverageWarnings.note: No screen covers the rate-limited / locked-out state — the flow loops back to Login with no lockout UI.
Password reset path is referenced in stories but absent from the flow and screens.
